name: Star Apple
flavor_text: A humble cosmic apple. Grows reliably in any soil.

name: Cosmo Mandarin
flavor_text: A staple fruit that glows orange. Also a favorite of rabbit-type pests.

name: Glass Banana
flavor_text: A curious banana with a see-through peel. Attracts pests well as bait.

name: Cosmic Strawberry
flavor_text: Fastest to grow. A friend in tight budgets. Taste is... eh.

name: Crystal Blueberry
flavor_text: A sparkling berry with a wonderful aroma.

name: Candle Pine
flavor_text: A pineapple whose tip glows like a flame.

name: Meteor Cherry
flavor_text: Grows as quickly as a shooting star.

name: Nebula Peach
flavor_text: A peach with nebula-patterned skin. A dessert staple.

name: Mangonian
flavor_text: A bright red cosmic mango. Holds untapped breeding potential.

name: Prism Melon
flavor_text: A premium melon that refracts light. Worth growing slowly.

name: Mars Watermelon
flavor_text: A rugged Mars-grown watermelon. Sizes up easily.

name: Star Grape
flavor_text: A mysterious grape that shines like a star. Renowned for its taste.

name: Star Kiwi
flavor_text: A kiwi that shines in a star shape. Beauty stands out.

name: Thorn Lemon
flavor_text: A cosmic lemon with intense sourness and aroma. Some pests dislike it.

name: Tropical Nova
flavor_text: A fruit like condensed starlight. High in all attributes.

name: Moondrop
flavor_text: A fruit glowing softly like a drop of moonlight. Taste and aroma stand out.

name: Dragon Fruit
flavor_text: A blazing fiery shell. Excellent size and aroma.

name: Cosmo Nectar
flavor_text: A wondrous fruit that drips honey on its own. Outstanding taste.

name: Asteroid Berry
flavor_text: A hard asteroid-like shell. Overwhelming size.

name: Phantom Grape
flavor_text: A translucent phantom grape. Otherworldly looks and aroma.

name: Cosmic King
flavor_text: A legendary fruit. Bears the radiance of the cosmos itself.

name: Void Fruit
flavor_text: A fruit grown from the void. A taste from the edge of the universe no one has known.

name: Crescent Yuzu
flavor_text: The ultimate yuzu blessed by crescent moonlight. The pinnacle of the orchard beyond all measure.
